title: Create Aeronautics: Delivery Required
description: Buy and Sell items using Aeronautics Contraptions
body:
![Delivey process](https://imgur.com/IVh2DIc.gif)
Create: Delivery Required is a logistics-focused addon built around Create: Aeronautics, Sable, and Create: Numismatics. The mod turns moving contuptions into real delivery vessels: players can mark Sable sub-levels, load them with requested items, fly or transport them into delivery zones, and complete contracts for currency rewards.

At the center of the system is the Contractor block - a contract hub where players can choose delivery jobs, accept timed objectives, and receive payouts through Numismatics coins or bank-card deposits. Delivery zones can be created, visualized, scanned, and managed by admins, while marked sub-levels are checked automatically when they enter the target area.

Showcase video: <iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/3hmxtE7Q1Dw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
